snippet.title: Ko Cha Ra (Official Music Video)
snippet.description: This music video is dedicated to every mother who put her own dreams aside so her children and family could have a better future. It’s a small tribute to the quiet strength, unconditional love, and countless sacrifices that often go unseen. To every mother who chose her family over her own dreams — thank you. We see you, we honor you, and we love you.

snippet.title: LALIBAZAR - Official Movie Teaser | Swastima Khadka,Rabindra Singh Baniya,Mukunda,Samaira, Prashamsa
snippet.description:
LALIBAZAR - New Nepali Movie Official Teaser 2026 || Swastima Khadka, Bishal Devkota, Rabindra Singh Baniya, Samaira Thapa, Prashamsa Subedi, Mukunda Kumar Shrestha, Abaya Baral, Asha Poudel, Govinda Sunar, Abha Aryal, Tara Sharma, Ramesh Badi, Nabaraj Regmi, Ghana Shyam Joshi, Pradip Dhakal, Mohan Panthi, JB Ruwali, Swarasoti Adhikari, Bhumika Tharu, Sagar Ghimire,Haroon Ali, Prem Pandey || Lalibazar New Nepali Full Movie 2026



Story/Director: Yam Thapa

Screen Play/Dialouge: Pradip Bhattari/Yam Thapa,

Chief Asst. Director: Aaksh Ukheda

2nd Asst. Director: Jeeban Dhungel

3rd Asst. Director: Yam Bahadur Karki

snippet.title: VTEN - TIMI NAI HAU (OFFICIAL VIDEO)
snippet.description: Don't expect love. Always put GOD first and leave rest for the world to worry about. "TIMI NAI HAU" is more than just a song but a self expression of how love can destroy and save you at the same time.

snippet.title: JAMESY - NACHANA ft VZN & Hennie Baker (Prod @YogeshBeats)
snippet.description:
“Nachana” is a high-energy Nepali track inspired by the infectious grooves of Brazilian funk, blended with our own desi flavor. 💃🏽🕺🏽
This song is all about movement, confidence, and letting the rhythm take over—when the beat drops, timi NACHANA.

From heavy bass to catchy hooks, “Nachana” brings global sounds together with a Nepali soul. Turn up the volume, feel the groove, and dance like nobody’s watching.

🎧 Listen. Feel. Nacha

Written and Performed by 

JAMESY
https://www.instagram.com/jamesyboy.dg/

snippet.title: The Kerala Story 2 Goes Beyond| Official Trailer| Vipul Amrutlal Shah| Kamakhya Singh| Aashin A Shah
snippet.description:
They targeted our daughters.
They broke their trust.
They stole their futures.

This time, we do not stay silent. The story goes beyond.

Is bar sahenge nahi… ladenge.

#TheKeralaStory2GoesBeyond – Official Trailer 

🎬 In Cinemas on 27th February, 2026

Production company : 
Sunshine Pictures

Produced by: Vipul Amrutlal Shah
Directed by: Kamakhya Narayan Singh
Co-Produced by: Aashin A. Shah, Ravichand Nallappa

Written by: Amarnath Jha, Vipul Amrutlal Shah
Music & Background Score: Mannan Shaah
Lyrics: Manoj Muntashir

Guest Music Director: (Kanha Re Kanha) Rahul Suhas
Choreography: Ganesh Acharya
Editor: Sanjay Sharma

Sound Designer: Manas Choudhury
Production Designer: Juhi Talmaki
Director of Photography: Abhijeet Chaudhari

Casting Director: Mukesh Chhabra, CSA
Costume Designer: Radhika Mehra
Action Director: Paramjeet Singh Pamma

Publicity Designs: Himanshu Nanda & Rahul Nanda

snippet.title: CID Bahu | सी.आई.डी बहू | Official Trailer | Amrapali Dubey | New Bhojpuri Movie 2026
snippet.description:
Movie: CID Bahu
Star Cast: Amrapali Dubey, Shweta Verma, Rambha Sahani,  Ayaz Khan, Vidhya Singh, Raj Singh Rajpoot, Puja Thakur, Sahil Siddique And Other
Banner: Shreyash Films PVT
Music On: Enter 10 Rangeela
Producer: Prem Rai
Writer & Director: Ananjay Raghuraj 
Dialogue & Screenplay: Arbind Tiwari 
Co-Producer: Shaista Khan  
Music: Sajan Mishra & Om Jha  
Lyrics: Dharam Hindustani, Durgesh Bhatt
Cinematography: Venket Mahesh 
Editor: Gurjant Singh
Choreographer: M K Gupta (Joy) 
Art: Nazir Shaikh
Costume: Vidha-Vishnu 
Post Production: Audio Lab
Background Music: Aslam Surti
Executive Producer: Nihal Singh
D.I & VFX: Mohit Kumar 
Production Controller: Amarjeet Das
Assistant Director: Vivek Kumar 
Stills: Kuber
Design: Narsu

मूवी: सी.आई.डी बहू
स्टार कास्ट: आम्रपाली दुबे, श्वेता वर्मा, रंभा साहनी, अयाज़ खान, विद्या सिंह, राज सिंह राजपूत, पूजा ठाकुर, साहिल सिद्दीकी और अन्य
बैनर: श्रेयश फिल्म्स PVT
म्यूज़िक ऑन: एंटर 10 रंगीला
निर्माता: प्रेम राय
कथा और निर्देशक: अनंजय रघुराज
पटकथा व संवाद : अरबिंद तिवारी
सह निर्माता: शाइस्ता खान
संगीत: साजन मिश्रा और ओम झा
गीत: धरम हिंदुस्तानी, दुर्गेश भट्ट
छायांकन: वेंकेट महेश
संकलन: गुरजंत सिंह
नृत्य: एम के गुप्ता (जॉय)
कला: नज़ीर शेख
कॉस्ट्यूम: विधा-विष्णु
पोस्ट प्रोडक्शन: ऑडियो लैब
पार्श्व संगीत: असलम सुरती
कार्यकारी निर्माता: निहाल सिंह
डी.आई. व  वी एफ एक्स : मोहित कुमार
निर्माण नियंत्रक: अमरजीत दास
सहायक निर्देशक: विवेक कुमार
स्टिल्स: कुबेर
डिज़ाईन: नर्सू

Yabi The Goat ft. KAVI G

snippet.title: Spider-Man: India Teaser Trailer (Hindi) | Shrey Thakkar | Everything media
snippet.description:
थोड़ा प्यार से देखना…
भारतीय गलियों में उसका ये पहला झूला है।

पिछले 6 महीनों से मैं फुल-टाइम जिस Spider-Man: India फिल्म के विज़न पर काम कर रहा हूँ,
उसका ये छोटा सा स्निपेट (प्रूफ ऑफ कॉन्सेप्ट) है।

अगर ये आपको एक्साइट करता है,
तो इसे आगे बढ़ाने में मदद करें — शेयर करें,
और सही लोगों तक पहुँचाने के लिए टैग करें।

ताकि ये सपना उन लोगों तक पहुँचे
जो इसे सच बना सकते हैं।

एक भारतीय Spider-Man सोलो फिल्म —
एक भारतीय द्वारा, पूरी दुनिया के लिए।

इस वीडियो में इस्तेमाल किया गया म्यूज़िक
उन विरासतों को सम्मान देने के लिए है
जिन्होंने पीढ़ियों को प्रेरित किया है।

सारे अधिकार मूल क्रिएटर्स के पास हैं।
ये एक नॉन-कमर्शियल प्रूफ ऑफ कॉन्सेप्ट है,
पूरे सम्मान के साथ बनाया गया।

localized.title: Spider-Man: India Teaser Trailer (Hindi) | Shrey Thakkar | Everything media
localized.description:
थोड़ा प्यार से देखना…
भारतीय गलियों में उसका ये पहला झूला है।

पिछले 6 महीनों से मैं फुल-टाइम जिस Spider-Man: India फिल्म के विज़न पर काम कर रहा हूँ,
उसका ये छोटा सा स्निपेट (प्रूफ ऑफ कॉन्सेप्ट) है।

अगर ये आपको एक्साइट करता है,
तो इसे आगे बढ़ाने में मदद करें — शेयर करें,
और सही लोगों तक पहुँचाने के लिए टैग करें।

ताकि ये सपना उन लोगों तक पहुँचे
जो इसे सच बना सकते हैं।

एक भारतीय Spider-Man सोलो फिल्म —
एक भारतीय द्वारा, पूरी दुनिया के लिए।

इस वीडियो में इस्तेमाल किया गया म्यूज़िक
उन विरासतों को सम्मान देने के लिए है
जिन्होंने पीढ़ियों को प्रेरित किया है।

सारे अधिकार मूल क्रिएटर्स के पास हैं।
ये एक नॉन-कमर्शियल प्रूफ ऑफ कॉन्सेप्ट है,

snippet.title: Zaalima - Arijit Singh | Shah Rukh Khan | Raees | Harshdeep Kaur | Valentine’s Special Love Song
snippet.description:
👉🏻 SUBSCRIBE to Zee Music Company - https://bit.ly/2yPcBkS

To Stream & Download Full Song: 
JioSaavn - https://bit.ly/44UCBEu

Apple Music - https://apple.co/48cwFK3

YouTube Music - https://bit.ly/3PEcI7C

Red Chillies Entertainment and Excel Entertainment Present
An Excel Entertainment Production.

Song - Zaalima
Music - JAM8
Lyrics - Amitabh Bhattacharya
Singers - Arijit Singh and Harshdeep Kaur
Choreography - Bosco- Caesar

Written by - Rahul Dholakia, Harit Mehta, Ashish Vashi & Niraj Shukla
Director Of Photography - K.U Mohanan ISC
Produced By - Ritesh Sidhwani, Gauri Khan & Farhan Akhtar
Directed By - Rahul Dholakia

Sound Design:- Dj Phukan, Sunny M.R.
Programmers:- Sourav Roy, Dj Phukan, Sunny M.R., Rohan Chauhan, Arijit Singh
Mix & Master:- Shadab Rayeen @ Newedge
Assistant:- Abhishek Sortey
Shoot Mix:- Ashwin Kulkarni
Recording Engineers:- Ashwin Kulkarni, Himanshu Shirlekar, Aaroh Velankar, Kaushik Das
Vocal Conductor:- Akashdeep Sengupta, Kaushik Das, Tushar Joshi

Musicians:-
Drums:- Alan Hertz
Bass:- Ernest Tibbs
Duff:- Iqbal Azad
Harmonium:- Feroz Shaikh
Acoustic Guitars:- Pawan Rasaily and Arijit Singh
Electric Guitars:- Pawan Rasaily 

Lyrics:
Jo Teri Khatir Tadpe Pehle Se Hi
Kya Usey Tadpana O Zaalima, O Zaalima
Jo Tere Ishq Mein Behka Pehle Se Hi
Kya Usey Behkana O Zaalima, O Zaalima

Aankhen Marhaba, Baatein Marhaba
Main Sau Martaba Deewana Huaa
Mera Na Raha Jab Se Dil Mera
Tere Husn Ka Nishana Hua

Jiski Har Dhadkan Tu Ho
Aise Dil Ko Kya Dhadkana
O Zaalima, O Zaalima

Saanson Mein Teri Nazdeeqiyon Ka
Itrr Tu Ghol De, Ghol De…
Main Hi Kyun Ishq Zaahir Karun
Tu Bhi Kabhi Bol De, Bol De…

Leke Jaan Hi Jaayega Meri
Qaatil Har Tera Bahaana Hua
Tujhse Hi Shuru
Tujhpe Hi Khatam
Mere Pyaar Ka Fasaana Hua

Tu Shamma Hai Toh Yaad Rakhna
Main Bhi Hoon Parwaana
O Zaalima, O Zaalima..

Deedaar Tera Milne Ke Baad Hi
Chhoote Meri Angdaayi
Tu Hi Bata De Kyun Zaalima Main Kehlayi..

#RaeesSongs #ShahRukhKhanSongs #ArijitSinghSongs #valentinesday #romanticsong #zaalima

snippet.title: ONE PIECE: Season 2 | Official Trailer | Netflix
snippet.description:
Straw Hats! Grab your crew! ONE PIECE: INTO THE GRAND LINE sets sail on March 10th!

MORE INFO ON ONE PIECE: INTO THE GRAND LINE:
Netflix’s epic high-seas pirate adventure, ONE PIECE, returns for Season 2—unleashing fiercer adversaries and the most perilous quests yet. Luffy and the Straw Hats set sail for the extraordinary Grand Line—a legendary stretch of sea where danger and wonder await at every turn. As they journey through this unpredictable realm in search of the world’s greatest treasure, they’ll encounter bizarre islands and a host of formidable new enemies.

ABOUT ONE PIECE:
Netflix’s live-action adaptation of ONE PIECE is based on Japan’s highest-selling manga series of all time by Eiichiro Oda, with over 100 volumes and 500M copies sold worldwide. The epic high-seas adventure follows Monkey D. Luffy on his quest to find the legendary fabled treasure, the ONE PIECE, and become King of the Pirates. The beloved franchise has a vast, multigenerational global fan base. Upon its debut in 2023, the Netflix live-action series became a global phenomenon, spending eight weeks on the Global Top 10, reaching #1 in over 75 countries and making history as the first Netflix English-language series to debut at #1 in Japan. The show has nearly 100M views and is one of Netflix’s most downloaded shows of all time. ONE PIECE was nominated for 11 awards at the Children’s & Family Emmy Awards, including Outstanding Young Teen Series. The beloved adaptation offers fans ways to engage year-round, off-screen with a brand new immersive experience set to open at Netflix House and fans can bring the world of the live-action show into their everyday lives with products like LEGO, Moose Toys and more at Netflix Shop and retailers worldwide. ONE PIECE returns for its highly anticipated second season in 2026, and has been renewed for Season 3. The show is created in partnership with Shueisha and is produced by Tomorrow Studios (an ITV Studios partner) and Netflix.

Watch on Netflix: https://www.netflix.com/title/81218765

About Netflix:
Netflix is one of the world’s leading entertainment services offering TV series, films, games and live programming across a wide variety of genres and languages. Members can play, pause and resume watching as much as they want, anytime, anywhere, and can change their plans at any time. 

ONE PIECE: Season 2 | Official Trailer | Netflix
https://www.youtube.com/@Netflix

en.title: ONE PIECE: Season 2 | Official Trailer | Netflix
en.description:
Straw Hats! Grab your crew! ONE PIECE: INTO THE GRAND LINE sets sail on March 10th!

MORE INFO ON ONE PIECE: INTO THE GRAND LINE:
Netflix’s epic high-seas pirate adventure, ONE PIECE, returns for Season 2—unleashing fiercer adversaries and the most perilous quests yet. Luffy and the Straw Hats set sail for the extraordinary Grand Line—a legendary stretch of sea where danger and wonder await at every turn. As they journey through this unpredictable realm in search of the world’s greatest treasure, they’ll encounter bizarre islands and a host of formidable new enemies.

ABOUT ONE PIECE:
Netflix’s live-action adaptation of ONE PIECE is based on Japan’s highest-selling manga series of all time by Eiichiro Oda, with over 100 volumes and 500M copies sold worldwide. The epic high-seas adventure follows Monkey D. Luffy on his quest to find the legendary fabled treasure, the ONE PIECE, and become King of the Pirates. The beloved franchise has a vast, multigenerational global fan base. Upon its debut in 2023, the Netflix live-action series became a global phenomenon, spending eight weeks on the Global Top 10, reaching #1 in over 75 countries and making history as the first Netflix English-language series to debut at #1 in Japan. The show has nearly 100M views and is one of Netflix’s most downloaded shows of all time. ONE PIECE was nominated for 11 awards at the Children’s & Family Emmy Awards, including Outstanding Young Teen Series. The beloved adaptation offers fans ways to engage year-round, off-screen with a brand new immersive experience set to open at Netflix House and fans can bring the world of the live-action show into their everyday lives with products like LEGO, Moose Toys and more at Netflix Shop and retailers worldwide. ONE PIECE returns for its highly anticipated second season in 2026, and has been renewed for Season 3. The show is created in partnership with Shueisha and is produced by Tomorrow Studios (an ITV Studios partner) and Netflix.

Watch on Netflix: https://www.netflix.com/title/81218765

About Netflix:
Netflix is one of the world’s leading entertainment services offering TV series, films, games and live programming across a wide variety of genres and languages. Members can play, pause and resume watching as much as they want, anytime, anywhere, and can change their plans at any time. 

ONE PIECE: Season 2 | Official Trailer | Netflix
https://www.youtube.com/@Netflix

snippet.title: Yabesh Thapa - Muskuraye | Live From EDN Sanepa | GhaamChhaya Intimate
snippet.description:
Hi lovelies,
Back in December, we did a very intimate show — just a few people, a lot of emotion, and the music that means everything to us. We filmed the night, and this is me and the band performing Muskuraye live at GhaamChhaya Intimate.

We’ll be sharing more moments from that evening soon. Until then, stream the album 'GhaamChhaya' on all major platforms.
And happy Valentine’s Day ;)

Keys / Vocals — Yabesh Thapa
Female BV — Oshin Karki
Male BV / AC Guitar — John Tamang
Drums — Stifler
Bass — Av Kc
Electric Guitar — Roshan Lama
Sarangi — Kiran Maharjan
Flute — Shrijan Maharjan
Audio Engineer — Neerab Shrestha

Mixed / Master — Kobid Bazra

Special thanks to Ruslan Studio and Jade Studio for supporting us.

Stay connected:
https://www.instagram.com/yabush69/

#ghaamchhaya

snippet.title: “Spider-Noir” –  True-Hue Full Color Teaser Trailer | Available In Multi - Audio | Prime Video India
snippet.description:
With no power comes no responsibility. "Spider-Noir" - a live-action series starring Nicolas Cage - arrives in True-Hue full color and authentic Black & White May 27 on Prime Video India, available in English, Hindi, Tamil, Telugu, Malayalam and Kannada.

Follow us on:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/primevideoin/
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/PrimeVideoIN/
X: https://x.com/PrimeVideoIN

ABOUT PRIME VIDEO
Prime Video is a one-stop entertainment destination offering customers a vast collection of premium programming in one application available across several devices. On Prime Video, customers can find their favourite Indian and international original series, movies, TV shows, and more, across multiple languages – including Indian-produced Original series like Mirzapur, Farzi, Panchayat, The Family Man, Dhootha, Jubilee, Dahaad, Made in Heaven, Suzhal – The Vortex, Inspector Rishi, Poacher, Indian Police Force, Paatal Lok, Rainbow Rishta, Wedding.con; Original movies like Maja Ma, Ammu, Mast Mein Rehne Ka; popular global Originals like Citadel, The Lord of The Rings: The Rings of Power, Fallout, Reacher, The Boys, The Wheel of Time, Road House, The Idea of You; some of the biggest post-theatrical films; direct-to-service films such as Shershaah, Soorarai Pottru, Sardar Udham, Bawaal, Gehraiyaan, Jai Bhim, Jalsa, Sherni, Narappa, Sarpatta Parambarai, Kuruthi, Joji, Malik, Pippa, HOME, Sharmajee Ki Beti, and many more of such titles. Additionally, Prime Video’s video entertainment marketplace, offers customers programming from partners such as Lionsgate Play, Discovery+ Crunchyroll, BBC Player, Sony Pictures – Stream, MGM+, FanCode, Chaupal, Manorama Max, Eros Now, Hoichoi, Anime Times, to name a few, via Prime Video add-on-subscriptions, as well as the option to rent movies, regardless of whether customers have a Prime membership or not. Customers can also go behind the scenes of their favorite movies and series with exclusive X-Ray access. Prime Video is one benefit among many that provides savings, convenience, and entertainment as part of the Prime membership. For more info visit www.amazon.com/primevideo.

#SpiderNoirOnPrime

snippet.title: Sushant KC - Ji Chanta Matina (Official Music Video)

Ji Chanta Matina invites you to stop hiding your feelings and let your heart speak. We bring you a playful confession of love. 

Written/Produced/Mixed by Sushant KC
Produced by Uff KC
Mixed/Mastered by Foeseal

Cast
Samrakshya | Sushant KC

Directed by: Abhiyan Kala Magar | Rajiv Sherchan | Sushant KC
Director of Photography (DOP): Abhiyan Kala Magar
Drone Operator: Sagar B.K.
Makeup & Hair: Riya Konaju | Reeya Ghising | Silpa Neupane
Assistant Team: Shrijan Shrestha | Sagar B.K.
Camera Assistant: Aman Shahi Thakuri
Production Team: Kapil Sim | Bishal Mahat
Camera & Lighting Support: Kushal Khadka | Shaney Ghale | Sailesh Gurung
Art & Styling: Nikki Shrestha
Behind The Scenes: S2 Productions
Post-Production: Thomas Magar
Logistics & Management: Gardens on Forest | Bishnu Sapkota | Laxman Sapkota

Special Appearances:

Hiroshi Khanal 
Avash bomjan (Abom/Minority report)
Janiva Shrestha 
Anu Pradhan 
Zoya Shakya 
Aria Shrestha 
Aarobi Shrestha

Special thanks to:

Lamjunge Dadaima Hawa Sarara – Hard Rock Tribute Version is a powerful musical dedication to the legendary Nepali icon Sunil Thapa. This special tribute by Ridam Labels blends nostalgic Nepali essence with electrifying hard rock energy to honor his unforgettable legacy.

This version transforms the classic cultural vibe into a high-voltage rock anthem — featuring heavy guitars, emotional vocals, and cinematic intensity. It represents strength, legacy, and timeless influence.

🌬️ “लमजुङ्गे डांडैमा हावा सरर…” — the breeze still echoes his presence.

This tribute is not just a song; it’s a celebration of memories, respect, and admiration for a legend who inspired generations.

snippet.title: Mera Dard Tum Na Samjh Sake | Broken Vibes | Heart Touching Qawwali Sad Song | Emotional Pain Song
snippet.description:
Mera Dard Tum Na Samjh Sake ek dil ko chhoo lene wala emotional song hai, jo un logon ke liye hai jinka dard lafzon se zyada gehra hota hai.
Ye gaana un yaadon, un aansuon aur us khamoshi ko bayan karta hai jise koi samajh nahi paata.
Agar aap broken vibes, heart touching sad songs, aur deep emotional music pasand karte hain, to ye song aapke dil tak zaroor pahuchega 💔
🎧 Headphones lagakar sunein aur apne dard ko mehsoos karein…
👉 Like | Share | Comment | Subscribe
👉 Apna dard comments me likho… shayad koi samajh le 🤍

#matimraihu #newnepalisong #lovesongnepali

[ Sansar Feriyo Timro Ujyalole

Badliyeka chhan Mero Ranga Haru 
Kaha Nai Janchhu Ma Timrai Ta Hu 

Ma Timrai Hu , Timrai Rahirahu la

Bihanile Ghaam , Saajhale Juno 
Parkhirahe Jhai Parkhirahu

Bagirahnu , Malai Chhoyi Rahanu 

[Maya Yo Sadhai Bhari 
Bagi Bagi Bagi Rahos 
Timimai Timimai 
Sansar Chali Rahos ] - 2 

Ma Timrai Hu , Timrai Rahula 
Jati Badha Aayeni , Timrai Aghi Hula

snippet.title: Lana Del Rey – Young And Beautiful (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
🎧 Welcome to Paradise 🌴
Your Home For The Best Urban Music With Lyrics!

“Lana Del Rey – Young And Beautiful” Lyrics / Lyric Video brought to you by Urban Paradise

⏬ “Might Just - Ella Mai” Out Now: 
https://24kgoldn.lnk.to/Prada

⚡️  This just how it is, no more what it was

🔔 Click the bell to stay updated on the best Lyrics / Lyric Videos from Urban Paradise!

✅ Follow all the music from Paradise Music on Spotify Playlists here!
https://open.spotify.com/user/wavemus​...

▶️ Urban Paradise:
https://www.instagram.com/Urbanparadiseyt​
https://www.facebook.com/Urbanparadiseyt​
https://twitter.com/Urbanparadiseyt​
Artist Links:
📺 Zara Larsson YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@A$AP Rocky

[Verse 1]
I've seen the world, done it all
Had my cake now
Diamonds, brilliant, and Bel Air now
 
[Pre-Chorus]
Hot summer nights, mid-July
When you and I were forever wild
The crazy days, city lights
The way you'd play with me like a child

[Chorus]
Will you still love me when I'm no longer young and beautiful?
Will you still love me when I got nothing but my aching soul?
I know you will, I know you will, I know that you will
Will you still love me when I'm no longer beautiful?

[Verse 2]
I've seen the world, lit it up as my stage now
Channeling angels in the new age now

[Pre-Chorus]
Hot summer days, rock and roll
The way you'd play for me at your show
And all the ways I got to know
Your pretty face and electric soul

[Chorus]
Will you still love me when I'm no longer young and beautiful?
Will you still love me when I got nothing but my aching soul?
I know you will, I know you will, I know that you will
Will you still love me when I'm no longer beautiful?

[Bridge]
Dear Lord, when I get to Heaven
Please, let me bring my man
When he comes, tell me that You'll let him in
Father, tell me if You can
All that grace, all that body
All that face makes me wanna party
He's my sun, he makes me shine like diamonds

[Chorus]
And will you still love me when I'm no longer young and beautiful?
Will you still love me when I got nothin' but my aching soul?
I know you will, I know you will, I know that you will
Will you still love me when I'm no longer beautiful?

[Outro]
Will you still love me when I'm no longer beautiful?
Will you still love me when I'm not young and beautiful?

Tags
#LanaDelRey #YoungAndBeautiful #NewMusic #PopMusic #Lyrics #LyricVideo #OfficialLyrics #LanaDelReyMusic #TrendingMusic #TopHits2025 #NewMusic2025 #UrbanParadise

snippet.description:
Presenting Trending Star Khesari Lal Yadav , Shilpi Raj ka new Bhojpuri Holi Song Choli Bheej Jata ( चोली भीज जाता) Ft. Priya Raghuwanshi. Khesari Lal Yadav aur Priya Raghuwanshi ki bhojpuri jodi Choli Bheej Jata ( चोली भीज जाता ) song aap sabhi ke dil pe raj karega aur 4 ke holi me dhamal machayega.

►Song - Choli Bhij Jata
 ►Singer - Khesari Lal Yadav, Shilpi Raj 
►Featuring - Priya raghuwanshi 
►Lyrics - Abhishek Bhojpuriya 
►Music Director - Aarya Sharma 
►Director - Pawan Pal 
►Video by - Wailens Production 
►Editor - Angad Pal

Agar aap Bhojpuri Holi song, latest Holi geet, Khesari Lal Yadav new song, Holi special Bhojpuri gana, ya Bhojpuri Holi aap ke liye aa gaya hai.

Daily Bhojpuri gaano ke update paye hamare What' App channel par
https://whatsapp.com/channel/0029VbBIHPf3bbV2sWiU1a2l

Lyrics
लागता जवानी में बावे कवनो बाधा
छुवला प कहा तारु आई हो दादा 2 
तेज धड़कन तहार धड़केला सीना हा सीना आरे सीना में 

चोली भिज जाता राजा जी पसीना में 
लहंगा लस-लस करे फागुन के महीना में 
मोबिल पलटी करS लेके आवा टीना में 
लहंगा लस-लस करे फागुन के महीना में 

हां मन मदहोश बा,जागल जोश बा 
भइल बाड़ू सरसो के फूल हो 
हां हा ऐ हमार पति सम्पति के छती होई 
करेला ना गति एको रति पागल मती होई 
तहरा खानी भूख नाही बा कवनो हसीना हसीना हो हसीना में 
चोली भिज जाता राजा जी पसीना में 
लहंगा लस-लस करे फागुन के महीना में 
मोबिल पलटी करS लेके आवा टीना में 
लहंगा लस-लस करे फागुन के महीना में 

धन अभिषेक के मरेलु चुम्मा फेक के 
संजय आ सोनू से ना लाज बावे 
लागता ना शर्म हमार गर्म मिजाज बावे 
तोहसे उखाड़त कुछ ना राजा रंगबाज़ बावे 
मजा बेसी पइबू खेसरिया कमीना हो कमीना हS कमीना में 
चोली भिज जाता राजा जी पसीना में 
लहंगा लस-लस करे फागुन के महीना में 
मोबिल पलटी करS लेके आवा टीना में 
लहंगा लस-लस करे फागुन के महीना में

LYRICS

Pokhara Stand Up !!! 

Pokhara Maa… 
Janmey, Hurkey, Halley, Hindey Pokhara Maa…
Pokhara City !
Pokhara Maa…
Taallai Taal Ko Taal Herdai Pokhara Maa… 
We Pokhara ! 

Ramro Sahar, Yo Hamro Sahar 
Pokhara City, Sablai Ghumney Rahar 
Lamachaur, Archalbot Ani Fulbari, Bagar 
Bhejjai Bheja Ley Bhariyeko Maha Nagar 
Tala Gaye Chorepatan, Mathi Gaye Bajhapatan 
Deep, Sangam, Laliguras 
Sab Jana Lai Abhibadhan 
Solti, Baaps, Bhaya Haru 
Ramro-Ramro Maya Haru 
Pokhara Maa Aau, Timle Bhetchau Dherai Dada Haru 
Chanchalay Chanchalay 
Hami Gandaki Anchalay 
Ja Pani Jey Pani, Garincha Maan Chalay 
Lakeside Ko Jhilimili 
Akha Mero Tiri Miri 
Fewa Taal Ko Cheu Maa Basi “Resham Fiririri…” 
Pool Pari, Pool Wari 
Hidchau Hami Hull Baadhi 
Garchau Hami Maan Maani !!!

Pokhara Maa… 
Parey Ma Local Keto, Repping Galli, Goreto !!!
Pokhara City ! 
Pokhara Maa…
Now What The Fuck? Yo Ho Real Street Talk !!! 
It’s a P-Town Bitch !
Pokhara Maa…
Om Harey Rama, Fucking No More Drama !!! 
West-Side BaeBay ! 
Pokhara Maa…
Parey Ma Local Keto, Repping Galli, Goreto !!! 
Thug Life ! 
Pokhara Maa…

Yeah ! Check ! Check !!
It’s Laure !
Ughh !!! 

Mailey Pahilo Chumma Khaye Pokhara Maa !
Taney Gaja Ko Pailo Sarko Maile Pokhara Maa ! 
Mera Keta Haru Tannai Chan Hai Pokhara Maa ! 
Sayed Marey Pachi Pani Jalchu Mai Pokhara Maa !
Maile Pokhreli Para Ajhai Chaina Fereko !
Yeha Machhapuchhre Ley Fewa Taal Ma Aaina Hereko ! 
Garo Cha Pattyauna Pokhreli Maisabh !
Bhagyemani Tyo Jasko Cha Pokhreli Jwaisabh ! 
Jhagada-Ladafa, Sab Bhanda Tagada ! 
Tole-Tole Ma Akhada, Nadekha Dherai Nakhara !
Fuskela Hai Bangara, Holas Feri Langada ! 
Khai Na Pai Ko Swag Nadekha Pokhreli Sanga Jhangada !!! 
Atom Bomb, Laure-Jamesy Ko Pair Bata…
Garjhancha Daju-Bhai Ko Jungle Ko Sher Bata…
Maa Kassam, Maile Koreko Sabdha Ko Aksher Bata…
Sundaichas Geet, Pokhara Ko Hune Wala Mayor Bata… 

Pokhara Maa…
Janmey, Hurkey, Halley, Hindey Pokhara Maa…
Pokhara City ! 
Pokhara Maa…
Taallai Taal Ko Taal Herdai Pokhara Maa… 
We Pokhara ! 
Pokhara Maa…
Parey Ma Local Keto, Repping Galli, Goreto !!!
West-Side Bitch !
Pokhara Maa…
Om Harey Rama, Fucking No More Drama !!! 

No More Drama 
Aba Hamro Pokhara Maa !!!

snippet.title: Tareefan (Official Video) - Sonu Thukral | Fukra Insaan | Kanika Mann | Romantic Song 2026
snippet.description:
ST Music presents "TAREEFAN" the ultimate romantic song of the year 2026, by the power house of romance Sonu Thukral, Penned by Nagii, and acted by the supremely talented duo Fukra Insaan and Kanika Mann. 

This song captures every heartbeat of love, from first attraction to endless admiration.

snippet.title: Testing 100% REAL Viral Hacks in Escape Tsunami For Brainrots..🤯🌊(Hindi)
snippet.description:
🌊 Escape Tsunami just got CRAZY!

In this video, I test NEW VIRAL hacks in Escape Tsunami for Brainrots to see if they actually work or if they’re just fake TikTok glitches 🤯
Some of these hacks are INSANELY overpowered, while others completely FAIL 💀

🔥 What happens when Brainrots use secret hacks against a giant tsunami?
👉 Watch till the end to see the most broken hack!

If you enjoy Escape Tsunami, Brainrot Roblox, and viral Roblox hacks, make sure to:
✅ LIKE
✅ SUBSCRIBE
✅ TURN ON NOTIFICATIONS

💬 Comment which hack worked the best!

snippet.title: Meri Ujeli (Official Music Video) -  Pahenlo Batti Muni
snippet.description:
Meri Ujeli is an ode to the brightness and warmth we’ve received from all those we have loved and those who have loved us. 

Stream the HQ Audio here: https://silentroar.ffm.to/meriujeli-pbm

Lyrics:
आकाशले त्यागेको पानीको नि
साथी बनिदिने इन्द्रेणी

जङ्गल खरानी भएपछि
टुसाउँछ जुन फूल बसन्त बनी

तिमी, तिमी,
तिमी, तिमी

शहरको चर्‍को कोलाहललाई
चिरेर गाउने सुस्केरी
गल्ली-गल्लीभित्रका चोकसरी
एक पहेली हौ, नयाँ दुनियाँ पनि

तिमी, तिमी,
तिमी, तिमी

बसन्तको गोँधूलीको अँगालोसरी
न्यानो छौ तिमी
मेरी उजेली

जूनकी सङ्गिनी, बगैँचाझैँ रङ्गीली,
कथाझैँ छौ तिमी, मेरी उजेली

मेरी उजेली तिमी, मेरी उजेली
मेरी उजेली तिमी, तिमी मेरी उजेली

Recording Studio: Project Studio Productions

🎤 Lyrics: French Montana - Unforgettable ft. Swae Lee

[Chorus: Swae Lee]
It's not good enough for me
Since I've been with you, ooh
It's not gonna work for you
Nobody can equal me (I know)
I'm gonna sip on this drink, when I'm f***ed up
I should know how to pick up
I'm gonna catch the rhythm
While she push up against me, ooh, and she tipsy
I had enough convo for 24
I peep'd you from across the room
Pretty little body dancin' like GoGo, hey
And you are unforgettable
I need to get you alone (Ooh)
Why not? A f***in' good time never hurt nobody
I got a little drink but it's not Bacardi
If you loved the girl, then I'm so, so sorry
I gotta give it to her like we in a marriage
Oh, like we in a hurry
No, no, I won't tell nobody
You're on your level too
Tryna do what lovers do
[Verse 1: French Montana]
Feelin' like I'm fresh out; Boosie (Boosie)
If they want the drama, got the Uzi (Uzi)
Ship the whole crew to the cruise ship (Cruise)
Doin' s*** you don't even see in movies (Movies)
Ride with me, ride with me, boss (Boss)
I got a hard head, but her ass soft (Soft)
She want the last name with the ring on it
'Cause I pulled out a million cash, told her plank on it

[Refrain: Swae Lee & French Montana]
And you are unforgettable
I need to get you alone
Now you wanna choose
Just pop the bubbly in the 'cuzi

[Chorus: Swae Lee]
It's not good enough for me
Since I've been with you, ooh
I'm gonna sip on this drink, when I'm f**ed up
I should know how to pick up
I'm gonna catch the rhythm
While she push up against me, ooh, and she tipsy
I had enough convo for 24
I peep'd you from across the room
Pretty little body dancin' like GoGo, hey
And you are unforgettable
I need to get you alone (Oeh)
Why not? A f***in' good time never hurt nobody
I got a little drink but it's not Bacardi
If you loved the girl, then I'm so, so sorry
I gotta give it to her like we in a marriage
Oh, like we in a hurry
No, no, I won't tell nobody
You're on your level too
Tryna do what lovers do
[Verse 2: French Montana]
You ain't enough for me
Too much for you alone
Baby, go and grab some bad bitches, bring 'em home
Know the jet's on me
I'ma curve my best for you, you know
So pick up that dress for me
Leave the rest on
Too much convo for 24 hours
When you stand next to 24 karats
She left her man at home
She don't love him no more
I want your mind and your body
Don't mind nobody
So, you don't ever hurt nobody
Baby girl, work your body, work your body

[Refrain: Swae Lee & French Montana]
And you are unforgettable
I need to get you alone
Now you wanna choose
Just pop the bubbly in the 'cuzi
Why not?

[Outro: Swae Lee]
Oh, like we in a hurry
No, no, I won't tell nobody
You're on your level too
Tryna do what lovers do

शिव अमृतवाणी

ॐ जय शिव ओंकारा

snippet.title: Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe Official Video Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya #bollywood #hindisong #2026
snippet.description:
Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe (Official Video ) (Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya) || Romantic Bollywood Hits Song 2026
Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya 2.0 💞 90s Bollywood Romantic Vibe | Soulful New Version

Song - Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe


तेरे बिना सूना है जहाँ, तेरे बिना तन्हा है दिल,
तेरे बिना हर धड़कन में, बस गूँजता है तेरा सिलसिला।
तेरी यादों की चादर ओढ़े, हर रात गुज़र जाती है,
तेरी तस्वीर आँखों में, फिर भी आँखें भीग जाती हैं।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरे होंठों की मुस्कान में, मैंने खुदा का नूर देखा,
तेरे आँचल की छाँव में, सारा सुकून देखा।
तेरी आवाज़ में वो मिठास है, जो साजों को जगा देती है,
तेरी खामोशी भी अब तो, मेरी रूह को सजा देती है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

कभी तेरी बातें याद आईं, तो दिल मुस्कुरा उठा,
कभी तेरी दूरी ने छू लिया, तो दिल बिखर उठा।
तेरे बिना जो जीना पड़ा, वो जीना ना रहा,
तेरे बिना हर लम्हा मेरा, अधूरा-सा रहा।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरे जाने के बाद भी, तेरा एहसास रहता है,
हर शाम तेरी यादों का, साया पास रहता है।
तेरे ख़त के अक्षर अब भी, महकते हैं जैसे फूल,
तेरे नाम से ही चलती हैं, मेरी हर मंज़िल की धूल।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरी आँखों में जो गहराई है, उसमें मेरा जहाँ है,
तेरे इश्क़ की पनाहों में, मेरी पहचान है।
तेरी राहों में बिछ जाऊँ, अगर तू मुस्कुराए,
तेरी ख़ुशी में अपनी हर सांस, मैं कुर्बान कर जाऊँ।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

कभी खामोशी में तेरा नाम लूँ, तो आँसू चल पड़ते हैं,
कभी तेरे ख़्वाबों में खो जाऊँ, तो लम्हे थम पड़ते हैं।
तेरे जाने के बाद भी, दिल तुझसे बातें करता है,
हर तन्हा रात में अब भी, तेरा ही ज़िक्र करता है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

अब बस इतना कह दूँ तुझसे, लौट आ किसी बहाने,
तेरे बिना ये दिल मेरा, टूटे पत्ते जैसा दीवाने।
तेरे प्यार में ही तो मेरी, दुनिया पूरी होती है,
तेरे आने से ही मेरी, ज़िंदगी रोशन होती है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

snippet.title: नमो नमो Namo Namo | Kedarnath | Sushant Rajput | Sara Ali Khan | Amit Trivedi |Amitabh B |Full Video
snippet.description:
Please Click To Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2LnYKVu

To Stream & Download Full Song: 
Spotify - https://spoti.fi/4gR9HeQ
JioSaavn - https://bit.ly/4gB1ICW
Gaana - https://bit.ly/4gGgIzO
iTunes - https://apple.co/3VZBodJ
Apple Music - https://apple.co/3VZBodJ
Amazon Prime Music - https://amzn.to/3PjcCl6
Hungama - https://bit.ly/40jbR0v
YouTube Music - https://bit.ly/3Pi6rNW

Song: Namo Namo
Singer: Amit Trivedi
Lyricist: Amitabh Bhattacharya
Composed & Produced by Amit Trivedi
Recording Engineers A T Studios  Mumbai  - Abhishek Sortey & Urmila Sutar  
Assisted by  Firoz Shaikh
Mixed & Mastered by Shadab Rayeen,  A T Studios & New Edge - Mumbai 
Assisted by Abhishek Sortey & Dhananjay Khapekar
Executive Producer A T Studios - Krutee Trivedi
Head Of Production A T Studios - Aashish Narula
Musician Names:-
Programmed -  Amit Trivedi, Raja Rasaily & Krishna Kishor
Percussions - Krishna Kishor
Flute - Vishnu Vijay
Sitar - Kishor 
Mandolin & Strings - Seenu 
Backing Vocals - Rajiv Sundaresan & Suhas Sawant

RSVP & Guy In The Sky Pictures present Kedarnath Starring: Sushant Singh Rajput, Sara Ali Khan, Nitish Bharadwaj, Alka Amin, Sonali Sachdev, Pooja Gor, Nishant Dahiya

Directed by Abhishek Kapoor 
Produced by Ronnie Screwvala & Pragya Kapoor 
Co-Produced by Abhishek Kapoor & Abhishek Nayyar 
Story: Abhishek Kapoor & Kanika Dhillon 
Screenplay & Dialogue: Kanika Dhillon 
Music: Amit Trivedi 
DOP: Tushar Kanti Ray 
Action Director: Dave Judge & Sunil Rodrigues 
Editor: Chandan Arora 
Background Score: Hitesh Sonik 
Sound Designer: Allwin Rego & Sanjay Maurya.

Lyrics:

Jai Ho Jai Ho Shankara
(Bholenath Shankara)
Aadi Dev Shankara
(Hey Shivay Shankara)
Tere Jaap Ke Bina
(Bholenath Shankara)
Chale Ye Saans Kis Tarah
(Hey Shivay Shankara)

Mera Karm Tu Hi Jaane
Kya Bura Hai Kya Bhalaa…
Tere Raaste Pe Main Toh
Aankh Moond Ke Chalaa…

Tere Naam Ki Jot Ne
Saara Har Liya Tamas Mera

Namo Namo Ji Shankara
Bholenath Shankara
Hey Triloknath Shambhu
Hey Shivay Shankara

Namo Namo Ji Shankara
Bholenath Shankara
Rudradev Hey Maheshvarah

Srishti Ke Janam Se Bhi
(O O…)
Pehle Tera Vaas Tha
(O O…)
Ye Jag Rahe Ya Naa Rahe
(O O…)
Rahegi Teri Aastha
(O O…)

Kya Samay… Kya Pralay
Dono Mein Teri Mahaanta
Mahaanta… Mahaanta…

Seepiyon Ki Ontt Main
(Bholenath Shankara)
Motiyaan Ho Jis Tarah
(Hey Shivay Shankara)
Mere Mann Mein Shankara
(Bholenath Shankara)
Tu Basa Hai Uss Tarah
(Hey Shivay Shankara)

Mujhe Bharam Tha Jo Hai Mera
Tha Nahin Kabhi Mera…

Arth Kya Nirarth Kya
Jo Bhi Hai Sabhi Tera…
Tere Saamne Hai Jhuka
Mere Sar Pe Haath Rakh Tera
Namo Namo Ji Shankara
Bholenath Shankara
Hey Triloknath Shambhu
Hey Shivay Shankara

Namo Namo Ji Shankara
Bholenath Shankara
Rudradev Hey Maheshvara

Chandrama Lalaat Pe (O O…)
Bhasm Hai Bhujaaon Mein (O O…)
Vastra Baagh Chhaal Ka (O O…)
Hai Khadau Paanv Mein (O O…)

Pyaas Kya Ho Tujhe
Ganga Hai Teri Jataaon Mein
Jataaon Mein… Jataaon Mein…

Doosron Ke Waaste
(Bholenath Shankara)
Tu Sadaiv Hai Jiya
(Hey Shivay Shankara)
Maanga Kuch Kabhi Nahi
(Bholenath Shankara)
Tune Sirf Hai Diya
(Hey Shivay Shankara)

Samudra Manthan Ka Tha Samay Jo Aa Pada
Dwand Dono Lok Me Vish-Amrit Pe Tha Chhida
Amrit Sabhi Main Baant Ke
Pyala Vish Ka Tune Khud Piya

Namo Namo Ji Shankara
Bholenath Shankara
Hey Triloknath Shambhu
Hey Shivay Shankara

Namo Namo Ji Shankara
Bholenath Shankara
Rudradev Hey Maheshvara
Rudradev Hey Maheshvara
Rudradev Hey Maheshvara

Music on Zee Music Company

Facebook - https://www.facebook.com/zeemusicdevotional
Instagram - https://www.instagram.com/zmcdevotional 
YouTube - https://bit.ly/2LnYKVu

snippet.title: Unstable SMP: The LAW
snippet.description:
temu avengers

Unstable SMP: The LAW

Unstable SMP:
➜  ⁨@FlameFragsMC 
➜  @Spokeishere  
➜  @ParrotX2 
➜  ⁨@wemmbumc 

minor spoilers below

featuring: @LettuceK @JadenMAN @minutetechmc @PrinceZam @MapiccMc @jumperwho @PurpledMC @Boosfer @Lomedy @fymada @HoraceMinecraft @TheobaldTheBird 

music from:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC9UKPs9ZisfhMJdalnETLRg (tons of the music I use is by AZALI so check him out!) 
https://www.youtube.com/@andreaszoeller (bunch of the cool minecraft ost remixes!)
https://www.youtube.com/@nombra101 (FlameFrags themes!)

This is a Minecraft video recorded in the Unstable Universe / Unstable SMP that is staged for story-telling purposes; any more staged videos I upload will have a disclaimer in the description saying that they are also staged. Also, a lot of the game mechanics/glitches/redstone discussed in Unstable SMP videos are unique to the Unstable SMP / Unstable Universe and either will not work the same/do not exist in vanilla Minecraft. 

music also from: official minecraft soundtrack, official elder scrolls soundtracks, official enderal soundtrack, epidemic sound (https://www.epidemicsound.com), storyblocks (https://www.storyblocks.com), artlist (https://artlist.io), soundstripe (https://www.soundstripe.com), fesliyan studios (https://www.fesliyanstudios.com/royalty-free-music), and envato (https://elements.envato.com/)

Enderal Soundtrack - Extended (HQ): Run of Things - Lauf der Dinge https://youtu.be/V5mExzEKWs8 by Marvin Kopp, licensed under CC BY 4.0 https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/

Enderal Soundtrack (HQ): Cycle - Zyklus https://youtu.be/5Xx4rNUey90 by Marvin Kopp, licensed under CC BY 4.0 https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/

Enderal Soundtrack (HQ): Prophet (dialogue) https://youtu.be/nreMC82GPo4 by Marvin Kopp, licensed under CC BY 4.0 https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/

Enderal Soundtrack (HQ): Phoenix https://youtu.be/cl-poVUU6_I by Marvin Kopp, licensed under CC BY 4.0 https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/

Enderal Soundtrack (HQ): The Lonely Mountain - Der Einsame Berg https://youtu.be/4e1smtwtPSA by Marvin Kopp, licensed under CC BY 4.0 https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/

Enderal Soundtrack (HQ): Brave new World - Schöne neue Welt https://youtu.be/QRQ8_vFVQIU by Marvin Kopp, licensed under CC BY 4.0 https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/

Enderal Soundtrack (HQ): Black Light - Schwarzes Licht https://youtu.be/h6QIAw0duF0 by Marvin Kopp, licensed under CC BY 4.0 https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/

snippet.title: 🔱पीछे बाराती आगे बैंड बाजा | गौरा खोल दरवाजा | Shiv Baraat Song 2026 | Maha Shivratri Special Bhajan
snippet.description:
#Shivratri #ShivBaraat #HarHarMahadev
महाशिवरात्रि की पावन बेला पर प्रस्तुत है शिव–पार्वती विवाह की दिव्य झांकी।
“पीछे बाराती आगे बैंड बाजा, गौरा खोल दरवाजा” – यह भजन भोलेनाथ की बारात की अद्भुत छवि प्रस्तुत करता है।

कैलाश से चली शिव की बारात, नंदी पर सवार महादेव, पीछे गणों की टोली, देवताओं की पुष्प वर्षा और द्वार पर खड़ी माता पार्वती…

इस पावन भजन को सुनकर आप भी बोल उठेंगे –
🙏 हर हर महादेव 🙏

यह भजन समर्पित है सभी शिव भक्तों को।
महाशिवरात्रि पर इस दिव्य विवाह का आनंद लें और अपने जीवन में शिव–शक्ति की कृपा प्राप्त करें।

अगर भजन पसंद आए तो:
👍 Like करें
🔔 Channel Subscribe करें
📢 Share जरूर करें

जय भोलेनाथ 🔱

shiv baraat song
maha shivratri bhajan 2026
piche barati aage band baja
gaura khol darwaza bhajan
shiv parvati vivah song
shivratri special bhajan
har har mahadev song
new shiv bhajan 2026
shiv shakti amar milan
bhole baba baraat

#Shivratri
#ShivBaraat
#HarHarMahadev
#ShivParvati
#Mahadev
#DevotionalSongs
#OriginalDevotionalContent

snippet.title: Poppy Playtime Chapter 5 (FULL GAME)
snippet.description:
Poppy Playtime Chapter 5 Full Gameplay Walkthrough with Thinknoodles of Poppy Playtime Chapter 5. This video is the full Poppy Playtime Chapter 5 Ending, Broken Things. This is Poppy Playtime's biggest and most terrifying chapter yet, facing off against the Prototype and Huggy Wuggy. In this chilling new layer of the Playtime facility, you will encounter the tortured denizens living in the darkness. New hands permit new and creative ways to explore with a new Grabpack. The Prototype's face will finally be revealed. LWill you escape this new realm of shadows with your sanity intact, or will you succumb to the horrors within?
🍜 SUBSCRIBE - https://www.youtube.com/channel/UChd1FPXykD4pust3ljzq6hQ?sub_confirmation=1
👉 BECOME A MEMBER - https://www.youtube.com/thinknoodles/join
🤖 Discord: https://discord.gg/thinknoodles

Face off against the deadly puppetmaster behind the horrifying events of Playtime Co.

In the latest terrifying chapter of the Poppy Playtime saga (Chapter 5), you are propelled further into the gruesome depths of the factory, with Playtime’s security system Huggy Wuggy in hot pursuit. 

Abandoned by your only allies, your fight for survival gets all the more challenging as you race further into the abyss that is His domain. 

Here, shadows whisper, and the puppet master who lords over this realm pulls the strings of madness. Can you stand against evil and finally put an end to this nightmare? Every bloody move forward will test your resolve as you uncover secrets years in the making.

Features:

Stomach-churning terrors await you in this new section of the factory as you uncover the dark works hidden within The Prototype’s stomping grounds.

In this chilling new layer of the Playtime facility, you will encounter the tortured denizens living in the darkness. They may aid you in your quest to defeat The Prototype, but can they be trusted? 

Solve devious puzzles and overcome dangerous environmental obstacles with the power of new GrabPack tools and functionality.

As you reach the true rotten heart at the center of Playtime, you will discover some of the company’s gravest sins.

Will you escape this new realm of shadows with your sanity intact, or will you succumb to the horrors within?

Chapters 📚
00:00:00 Cinematic Opening & Chapter 5 Start
00:03:12 Huggy Wuggy Chase Tutorial Escape
00:30:28 Meeting Giblet
00:32:43 First Prototype Encounter
00:41:55 Bron & GrabPack 3.0
00:45:40 New Pressure Hand
00:57:56 Limon Easter Egg
01:09:16 Meeting Chum Chompkins
01:22:31 Magnetic Bracelets
01:36:09 Prototype Returns
01:53:47 Huggy Memory: “I’ve Always Been a Toy”
02:07:53 Blue VHS Tape
02:14:36 Playing As Huggy Wuggy
02:25:24 Entering Sweet Street
02:33:56 Meeting Lily Lovebraids
02:35:57 Finding Kissy Missy & Poppy
03:03:18 Prototype Face Reveal
03:30:23 Huggy & Kissy Reunion

#poppyplaytime #poppyplaytimechapter5 #thinknoodles

Here, shadows whisper, and the puppet master who lords over this realm pulls the strings of madness. Can you stand against evil and finally put an end to this nightmare? Every bloody move forward will test your resolve as you uncover secrets years in the making.

Features:

Stomach-churning terrors await you in this new section of the factory as you uncover the dark works hidden within The Prototype’s stomping grounds.

In this chilling new layer of the Playtime facility, you will encounter the tortured denizens living in the darkness. They may aid you in your quest to defeat The Prototype, but can they be trusted? 

Solve devious puzzles and overcome dangerous environmental obstacles with the power of new GrabPack tools and functionality.

As you reach the true rotten heart at the center of Playtime, you will discover some of the company’s gravest sins.

Will you escape this new realm of shadows with your sanity intact, or will you succumb to the horrors within?

snippet.title: Tamang Selo - Figure Timro Dami · फिगर तिम्रो दामी - Official MV
snippet.description:
https://www.tiktok.com/@kumarbmzn  https://www.facebook.com/Kumarbmzntamang 

“𝗙𝗶𝗴𝘂𝗿𝗲 𝗧𝗶𝗺𝗿𝗼 𝗗𝗮𝗺𝗶” · 𝗕𝗶𝘀𝗵𝘄𝗼 𝗗𝗼𝗻𝗴 | 𝗦𝗵𝗮𝗻𝘁𝗶 𝗦𝗵𝗿𝗲𝗲 𝗣𝗮𝗿𝗶𝘆𝗮𝗿 | 𝗞𝘂𝗺𝗮𝗿 𝗕𝗼𝗺𝗷𝗮𝗻 | Ashish Manandhar | Rasmila Tamang.

          After the amazing response to the “𝗙𝗶𝗴𝘂𝗿𝗲 𝗧𝗶𝗺𝗿𝗼 𝗗𝗮𝗺𝗶” 𝗔𝘂𝗱𝗶𝗼 𝗦𝗼𝗻𝗴, we are excited to present the 𝗢𝗳𝗳𝗶𝗰𝗶𝗮𝗹 𝗠𝘂𝘀𝗶𝗰 𝗩𝗶𝗱𝗲𝗼. This release is a result of the immense love, support, and encouragement from all our viewers and listeners. We hope you enjoy this visual presentation just as much as you enjoyed the audio. Your continuous support motivates us to create more music and creative content in the future.
       
This music video features 𝗥𝗮𝘀𝗺𝗶𝗹𝗮 𝗧𝗮𝗺𝗮𝗻𝗴 and 𝗔𝘀𝗵𝗶𝘀𝗵 𝗠𝗮𝗻𝗮𝗻𝗱𝗵𝗮𝗿 in the lead roles. Ashish Manandhar is a highly talented dancer, experienced dance instructor, and versatile model. The video highlights 𝘃𝗶𝗿𝗮𝗹 𝘀𝘁𝗲𝗽 𝗱𝗮𝗻𝗰𝗲 𝗰𝗵𝗼𝗿𝗲𝗼𝗴𝗿𝗮𝗽𝗵𝘆 𝗰𝗿𝗲𝗮𝘁𝗲𝗱 𝗯𝘆 𝗔𝘀𝗵𝗶𝘀𝗵 𝗠𝗮𝗻𝗮𝗻𝗱𝗵𝗮𝗿, which has become a major attraction of the song. Representing the Tamang community, 𝗥𝗮𝘀𝗺𝗶𝗹𝗮 𝗧𝗮𝗺𝗮𝗻𝗴 is a beautiful and hardworking model, widely recognized for her impressive performances in popular music videos. The music video is 𝗰𝗵𝗼𝗿𝗲𝗼𝗴𝗿𝗮𝗽𝗵𝗲𝗱 𝗮𝗻𝗱 𝗱𝗶𝗿𝗲𝗰𝘁𝗲𝗱 𝗯𝘆 𝗠𝗮𝘂𝘀𝗮𝗺 𝗛𝗶𝗺𝗮𝗹𝗶, an accomplished director known for delivering several superhit Nepali songs. 
     
🎤 This is also the 𝗳𝗶𝗿𝘀𝘁-𝗲𝘃𝗲𝗿 𝗱𝘂𝗲𝘁 𝘀𝗼𝗻𝗴 𝗯𝘆 𝗕𝗶𝘀𝗵𝘄𝗼 𝗗𝗼𝗻𝗴 and 𝗦𝗵𝗮𝗻𝘁𝗶 𝗦𝗵𝗿𝗲𝗲 𝗣𝗮𝗿𝗶𝘆𝗮𝗿, with the song written by 𝗞𝘂𝗺𝗮𝗿 𝗕𝗼𝗺𝗷𝗮𝗻, making it a special and memorable collaboration for everyone involved.

🎧 Enjoy the perfect blend of a catchy melody, dancing vibe, witty lyrics, and pure Nepali vibes.
 
Please don’t forget to 𝗟𝗶𝗸𝗲, 𝗦𝗵𝗮𝗿𝗲, 𝗦𝘂𝗯𝘀𝗰𝗿𝗶𝗯𝗲 and leave your valuable feedback in the comments below.
Thank you for the continued love and support ❤️

Presented by 𝗞𝘂𝗺𝗮𝗿𝗯𝗺𝘇𝗻  | Music Distribution Partner 𝗠𝘂𝘀𝗶𝗰 𝗦𝗽𝗮𝗿𝗸.

♫ 𝗢𝗳𝗳𝗶𝗰𝗶𝗮𝗹 𝗔𝘂𝗱𝗶𝗼 𝗖𝗿𝗲𝗱𝗶𝘁:
✎ Lyricist: Kumarbmzn 
♪ Music Composer: Bishwo Dong 
🎙 Singer: Bishwo Dong and Shanti Shree Pariyar
🎸 Music Arranger: Bishwo Dong
🎛️ Mixing Master: Dipesh Pradhan
🎧 Rec.: Dong Studio 

🎬 𝗢𝗳𝗳𝗶𝗰𝗶𝗮𝗹 𝗩𝗶𝗱𝗲𝗼 𝗖𝗿𝗲𝗱𝗶𝘁:

🖼️ Post Production: Luminous Postwork

Dil Lagana Mana Tha is an emotional romantic song that captures the pain of falling in love when the heart was warned not to. This video portrays deep feelings of love, heartbreak, and unspoken emotions, reflecting the journey of a heart that couldn’t resist love despite knowing the consequences. Beautiful visuals and soulful music come together to tell a story many will relate to.

snippet.title: Phsyco – Andhakar Jivan | Feat. Jung Ji & Vol Quake | (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
Andhakar Jivan by Phsyco featuring Jung Ji & Vol Quake is a nepali rap song that reflects inner battles, broken dreams, and the silent pain hidden in everyday life. This emotional Nepali hip hop track explores psychological struggles, social hypocrisy, and the search for truth in a world where faith, humanity, and hope are constantly questioned. A raw and intense anthem representing real Nepali rap culture and underground hip hop. 🕯️🔥

🎵 Song Credits
Produced by Vol Quake
Mixed & Mastered by Vol Quake
Performed by Phsyco, Jung Ji & Vol Quake

snippet.title: Ruth B. - Dandelions (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
Ruth B. - Dandelions
Stream/Download:

(Lyrics):
Maybe it's the way you say my name
Maybe it's the way you play your game
But it's so good, I've never known anybody like you
But it's so good, I've never dreamed of nobody like you

[Pre-Chorus]
And I've heard of a love that comes once in a lifetime
And I'm pretty sure that you are that love of mine

[Chorus]
'Cause I'm in a field of dandelions
Wishing on every one that you'd be mine, mine
And I see forever in your eyes
I feel okay when I see you smile, smile

[Post-Chorus]
Wishing on dandelions all of the time
Praying to God that one day you'll be mine
Wishing on dandelions all of the time, all of the time

[Verse 2]
I think that you are the one for me
Cause it gets so hard to breathe
When you're looking at me
I've never felt so alive and free
When you're looking at me
I've never felt so happy

[Pre-Chorus]
And I've heard of a love that comes once in a lifetime
And I'm pretty sure that you are that love of mine

[Chorus]
Cause I'm in a field of dandelions
Wishing on every one that you'd be mine, mine
And I see forever in your eyes
I feel okay when I see you smile, smile

[Post-Chorus]
Wishing on dandelions all of the time
Praying to God that one day you'll be mine
Wishing on dandelions all of the time, all of the time

[Bridge]
Dandelion into the wind you go
Won't you let my darling know?
Dandelion into the wind you go
Won't you let my darling know that

[Chorus]
I'm in a field of dandelions
Wishing on every one that you'd be mine, mine
And I see forever in your eyes
I feel okay when I see you smile, smile

[Post-Chorus]
Wishing on dandelions all of the time
Praying to God that one day you'll be mine
Wishing on dandelions all of the time, all of the time

[Outro]
I'm in a field of dandelions
Wishing on every one that you'd be mine, mine

If you go, I'm goin' too, uh
'Cause it was always you (Alright)
And if I'm turnin' blue, please don't save me
Nothin' left to lose without my baby

[Refrain]
Birds of a feather, we should stick together, I know
I said I'd never think I wasn't better alone
Can't change the weather, might not be forever
But if it's forever, it's even better

[Pre-Chorus]
And I don't know what I'm cryin' for
I don't think I could love you more
It might not be long, but baby, I

[Chorus]
I'll love you 'til the day that I die
'Til the day that I die
'Til the light leaves my eyes
'Til the day that I die

[Verse 2]
I want you to see, hmm
How you look to me, hmm
You wouldn't believe if I told ya
You would keep the compliments I throw ya
But you're so full of shit, uh
Tell me it's a bit, oh
Say you don't see it, your mind's polluted
Say you wanna quit, don't be stupid

[Pre-Chorus]
And I don't know what I'm cryin' for
I don't think I could love you more
Might not be long, but baby, I
Don't wanna say goodbye

[Chorus]
Birds of a feather, we should stick together, I know ('Til the day that I die)
I said I'd never think I wasn't better alone ('Til the light leaves my eyes)
Can't change the weather, might not be forever ('Til the day that I die)
But if it's forever, it's even better

[Post-Chorus]
I knew you in another life
You had that same look in your eyes
I love you, don't act so surprised

#billieeilish #birdsofafeather #celesty #lyrics

snippet.title: Sushant Bhujel - Ek Choti ft.Sujana Syangbo & Sujan Moktan  (OFFICIAL MV)
snippet.description:
“Ek Choti” – This song is about a village boy and girl who fall in love. Their love is pure and strong, but the girl’s father does not accept their relationship. Because of this, they face many problems and feel heartbroken. In the end, they decide to run away together so they can stay united and protect their love.

The music video was shot in Lurpung village, showing the natural beauty, simple village life, and the true feelings of young love.

🟢Stream this song on:
https://ditto.fm/ek-choti

🎤 Vocals : Myself (Sushant Bhujel Tamang)
https://www.instagram.com/sushant_bhuzel/

https://open.spotify.com/artist/64sKQq4agX9GHUkeQIsfRx?si=G7XDeFaoSV6AgiZMFbN4qg
https://www.tiktok.com/@sushant.bhujel2
💸Producer: Top Bdr Bhujel
🎶 Outro Vocals: Sujan Moktan
🎶 Female Vocals : Aakriti Dulal
https://www.instagram.com/aakriti_dulal/

🎼 Music Produced and mix/Mastering: Kila Music
https://www.instagram.com/kilamusic4u/

🎬Visuals: Plug Substance
https://www.instagram.com/plug.substance/

DOP and cinematographer : Sujab Banjara
https://www.instagram.com/sujav_banjara/
Directed By Nemey Youngin
https://www.instagram.com/nemeyyoungins/

Cast: Sujana Syangbo & Sujan Moktan
https://www.instagram.com/sujana_syangbo/
https://www.instagram.com/kilamusic4u/

Choreography: Salav Maharjan and Sujana Syangbo
Makeup Artist: Evani Khadgi
 https://www.instagram.com/evanikhadgilama/

🎤 Recorded at : Clouds Records 
https://www.instagram.com/clouds_records_official/

🏫Location : Lurpung, Karve
Side Casts: Salav Maharjan, Sushant Bhujel, Manisha Shrestha, Prakriti Pakhrin, Evani Khadgi, Basil Gurung, Nima lama, Chyangba Maya lama

I’ve poured my memories and emotions into this one—hope it touches your heart too. 💙


Special Thanks To :
Laxman Bal, Adarsh, Amir  Moktan, 


Uploading this channel's content without permission from Sushant Bhujel is strictly prohibited.
For business inquiries sushantbusiness725@gmail.com
Please Like, Share and Subscribe our channel for more content.
All Rights Reserved by Sushant Bhujel © 2025

लो-फाई भजन पारंपरिक भक्ति संगीत को लो-फाई संगीत के सुखदायक, उदासीन गुणों के साथ जोड़ता है। इसमें शांत धुन और कोमल लय होती है जो शांति और आध्यात्मिक चिंतन की भावना पैदा करती है। वाद्य-यंत्र में अक्सर तबला, हारमोनियम, सितार और बांसुरी जैसे ध्वनिक वाद्य शामिल होते हैं, जो विनाइल क्रैकल या परिवेशी ध्वनियों जैसे सूक्ष्म लो-फाई तत्वों पर परतदार होते हैं। स्वर, चाहे एकल हों या कोरस, दिल से भावनाओं के साथ भक्ति गीत प्रस्तुत करते हैं, जो एक ध्यानपूर्ण और चिंतनशील मूड को प्रोत्साहित करते हैं। यह संलयन एक अनूठा सुनने का अनुभव बनाता है जो प्राचीन आध्यात्मिक परंपराओं को समकालीन लो-फाई सौंदर्यशास्त्र के साथ मिलाता है, जो आंतरिक सद्भाव और श्रद्धा में एक शांत यात्रा प्रदान करता है।

A lo-fi bhajan combines traditional devotional music with the soothing, nostalgic qualities of lo-fi music. It features serene melodies and gentle rhythms that evoke a sense of peace and spiritual contemplation. The instrumentation often includes acoustic instruments like tabla, harmonium, sitar, and flute, layered over subtle lo-fi elements such as vinyl crackles or ambient sounds. The vocals, whether solo or in chorus, deliver devotional lyrics with heartfelt emotion, encouraging a meditative and reflective mood. This fusion creates a unique listening experience that merges ancient spiritual traditions with contemporary lo-fi aesthetics, offering a tranquil journey into inner harmony and reverence.

snippet.title: Dilip Bishwokarma - Maile Chaheko | Official Music Video |
snippet.description:
Sometimes we love someone quietly and deeply.A one-sided love that lives in our hearts, unexpressed and untold feelings.A love that lives in our hearts but remains unspoken.This song comes from a love I kept in my heart back in school time. I never expressed what I felt for her, so the music became my voice.

This song is for all those hidden feelings,For the love we feel but can’t say aloud.If you’ve ever loved someone silently, this song is for you too.

Song Credit
Vocal/Lyrics - Dilip Bishwokarma 
Composed - Dilip And The Valley Crew
Drum - Carey Maharjan 
Guitar - Nidiv Kayastha
Bass - Sajiv Shrestha
Flute - Swarnim Maharjan
Keys - Miraj Shrestha
Recorded at Capsule Corp. Studio
Production, Mixing and Mastering - Ragyan Shrestha
Drum take ( Studio Nepal ) 
Project head/Band manager - Carey Maharjan

Video team 
DOP :Fumu/Prabish Newa
Edit/colour : LUFFY

Do follow on
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/dilipbishwokarma__  
Facebook:  https://www.facebook.com/dilipbishwokarma.01
Tiktok:  https://www.tiktok.com/@dilip_bishwokarma7
Spotify :  https://open.spotify.com/artist/197wrTQ2T07V3C0hITzaqT

Special Thanks 
Anil Ghatane
Niraj Baraili
St Man
Nepa events 
Sujan Maharjan
Diwash Neupane
Ashish Nepali
Sanjog Pradhan
Sandeep Adhikari
Ukesh gtr
Slimhood (clothing brand )
Ajit Lammas

Movie: Soldier

Song Lyrics:

Dil Tu Chura Le Gaya

Dil Tera Uda Le Gaya

Na Na Na Meri Haan Ban Gayi 
Tu Tu Tu Meri Jaan Ban Gayi 
Aji Kyun Kyun Kyun Mujhe Pyar Ho Gaya 
Yoon Yoon Yoon Iqraar Ho Gaya 
Kasam Se Tu Bada Jhootha 
Ho Sanam Toone Mujhe Loota 
Yoon Milaake Nazar Karke Jaadugari 
Deke Dard-E-Jigar Aage Peechhe Dolkar 
Soldier Soldier Meetthi Baatein Bolkar

snippet.title: Mahashivratri Special 2026 - भगवान शिव के 8 दिव्य मंत्र | शिव साधना | कर्पूर गौरम करुणावतारं
snippet.description:
Mahashivratri Special 2026 - भगवान शिव के 8 दिव्य मंत्र | शिव साधना | कर्पूर गौरम करुणावतारं

#bhajan #bhaktisagar #relaxing
#bhaktisagar #bhajan  #shiv  #relaxing  #shiva  #bollywood  #bholenath  #bhakti  #omnamahshivaya 


#omnamahshivaya  #Meditation #Om #meditation music
Welcome to this calming meditation session where we explore the power of chanting the sacred mantra "Om Namah Shivaya." This powerful mantra is not just a chant; it is a doorway to inner peace, healing, and spiritual transformation.

In this video, I guide you through the practice of chanting "Om Namah Shivaya," helping you connect with the divine energy of Lord Shiva, the source of creation and destruction. Whether you're a beginner or an experienced meditator, this practice is a simple yet profound way to quiet the mind, relax the body, and bring balance to your life.

Benefits of Chanting "Om Namah Shivaya":

Reduces stress and anxiety
Brings clarity and mental peace
Enhances spiritual connection
Promotes physical and emotional healing
Balances the mind, body, and soul
How to Practice:

Find a quiet and comfortable place.
Focus on your breath to relax and center yourself.
Chant "Om Namah Shivaya" along with your breath.
Visualize Lord Shiva or simply let the vibration of the mantra guide you inward.
Feel the calming effects as you continue chanting.
Chanting this mantra can help you align with your true self and experience deep meditation. Let this video be a reminder that peace is just a breath away.

Don't forget to LIKE, COMMENT, and SUBSCRIBE for more spiritual practices, meditation guides, and tips for a peaceful life.

snippet.title: Franklin Traps ALL DEADLY GHOST Inside Evil Watch in Indian Bike Driving 3D! 😱
snippet.description:
#NessFitGamer #gta 5 #gta5hindi #gta5mods 

Franklin Traps ALL DEADLY GHOST Inside Evil Watch in Indian Bike Driving 3D! 😱

In this story, Shinchan and Franklin get trapped inside another world created by the Evil Watch. The demon inside the watch traps them and takes Shinchan away with him. To save Shinchan, Franklin must trap all the ghosts and monsters that were released from the Evil Watch back inside it. These include Granny, Huggy Wuggy, Mr. Meat, Choo-Choo Charles, Kamla , and the Pennywise. Will Franklin be able to save Shinchan or not? Watch the full scary story to find out!

Instagram
https://www.instagram.com/nessfitgamer01?igsh=MTBudmpzZGdnZXljNg==

I hope you guys enjoyed this video if you did please consider to like the video and subscribe the channel. ❤️

Some 3D assets and mods are sourced from community modders and are used for fan-made cinematic purposes.
No ownership is claimed over any third-party assets.

Disclaimer:
This video is made using GTA 5, with Indian Bike Driving 3D assets added inside the game.

This is NOT actual gameplay of Indian Bike Driving 3D. Everything shown is custom-made using GTA mods. All characters and events shown in this video are fictional and created for entertainment purpose.
 
This is a fan-made, fictional, and transformative video that falls under Fair Use (Section 107) for commentary, parody, and storytelling.
